home.title: Uttara Farm — Prosperity through ginger farming in Vidarbha
home.description: A social initiative supporting farmers in Ralegaon and Vidarbha, Maharashtra with ginger expertise, soil testing, and access to major markets.

about.title: About — Uttara Farm & Vijay Uttarwar
about.description: Uttara Farm is a social project led by Vijay Uttarwar, founder of Naturell (Max Protein and more), which joined Zydus Wellness in 2024—giving back to villages near Ralegaon.

hero.title: Prosperity for farmers through high-value ginger
hero.subtitle: We help farming families in Ralegaon and Vidarbha grow ginger with expert guidance, practical tools, and fair access to big-city markets.

mission.title: A social project rooted in local farming
mission.p1: Agriculture is the backbone of our region. Uttara Farm exists to help farmers build economic stability from the land they already know—without having to leave it behind.
mission.p2: By focusing on a high-value crop like ginger and surrounding farmers with training, testing, and market connections, we aim to turn local farming into a more resilient livelihood.

ginger.title: Why ginger
ginger.lead: Ginger can earn strong returns—but it is demanding. Success depends on soil health, careful cultivation, and timing.
ginger.p1: Unlike some crops, ginger needs attention through the season: land preparation, nutrition, water, and disease management all matter. That is why going it alone is risky.
ginger.p2: Our programme reduces that risk by pairing farmers with experienced ginger advisors, soil insight, and a clearer path from field to buyers in larger cities.

knowledge.title: Knowledge & field guidance
knowledge.body: Hands-on training and season-long advice from ginger consultants—including specialists like Nilesh—so practices match local soil and weather.

infrastructure.title: Tools & soil insight
infrastructure.body: Access to soil testing kits and support through Warkem, helping farmers understand their land before they plant and adjust nutrition responsibly.

markets.title: Scale, logistics & markets
markets.body: Working toward better bundling, grading, and transport so produce can reach tier-1 markets such as Mumbai—capturing economies of scale small lots often miss.

region.title: Ralegaon & Vidarbha
region.p1: We work in Ralegaon and the wider Vidarbha region of Maharashtra—communities where farming shapes daily life and seasonal income.
region.p2: Our effort is deliberately local: solutions should fit Vidarbha’s climate, soils, and the realities of family farms.

partners.title: Partners & contributors
partners.body: Uttara Farm brings together field experts, soil-testing partners, and market allies. Names and logos here recognise those who make the programme possible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Farmers, cooperatives, and supporters can reach Vijay directly about Uttara Farm.

footer.rights: Uttara Farm. Supporting farmers in Ralegaon and Vidarbha.

aboutPage.title: Why Uttara Farm exists
aboutPage.lead: Uttara Farm is a social project—not a commercial venture. It exists to put entrepreneurial experience and networks to work for farming families in the region Vijay comes from.
aboutPage.p1: The initiative is led by Vijay Uttarwar, founder of Naturell (India), the company behind well-known nutrition brands such as Max Protein and other everyday wellness foods.
aboutPage.p2: In 2024, Naturell became part of Zydus Wellness, one of India’s leading listed consumer health companies—recognition for years of building trusted brands.
aboutPage.p3: Vijay grew up in Bhamb, a village near Ralegaon in Vidarbha. That grounding shapes this project: solutions must work for real villages, real seasons, and real risk.
aboutPage.p4: His dream is simple to state and hard to do: help villagers prosper economically while staying rooted in farming and local identity.
aboutPage.brandsIntro: These names mark the journey behind Uttara Farm’s purpose-led work in the villages.
aboutPage.captionMax: Max Protein — flagship protein snacks & bars
aboutPage.captionZydus: Zydus Wellness — Naturell joined this listed company in 2024
